title: Widget Font ( Font)
text: Widget Font ( Font) The Widget Font ( Font) property determines the font used to display the text in this widget. Font = Font Description The default font is specified by the editfont definition in the application's .ini file. If the specified font is larger than the available space in the widget, the widget can behave unpredictably at run time. To correct this, choose a smaller font or enlarge the size of the widget. Example: Setting in ProcScript $properties(FLD1) = "Font=TahomaSmall" Copy Applies To ucolorbox (ColorBox) ucolorlist (ColorList) ucombobox (Combo Box) CommandButton udropdownlist (DropDownList) EditBox uhyperlink (Hyperlink) ulistbox (ListBox ) umeter (Meter) uoutputbox (OutputBox) (umonthcalendar) MonthCalendar uradiogroup (RadioGroup) urtfeditbox (RichEditBox) uspinbutton (SpinButton) utab (Tab) utabex (TabEx) utree (Tree) Was this topic helpful?
